schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Youth Art Training Fellowship Scheme" has been launched by the Department of Culture, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to promote interest and skill development among youth in various art forms such as music, dance, theatre, painting, and crafts. Under this scheme, monthly training fellowships are provided to selected young artists to support their artistic training.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Monthly training fellowship of ₹10,000 per selected participant. - Professional art training at [government-recognized art and music institutions (Page No. 3)](https://www.culturemp.in/pdfs/fellowship-2023.pdf).- Certification after successful completion of training. - Opportunity to receive structured guidance in classical, tribal, and folk art forms. - The fellowship is valid only for the approved training period of 3 months.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage youth in arts by providing a monthly fellowship and professional training through government institutions.

children.text: The “Youth Art Training Fellowship Scheme" has been launched by the Department of Culture, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to promote interest and skill development among youth in various art forms such as music, dance, theatre, painting, and crafts. Under this scheme, monthly training fellowships are provided to selected young artists to support their artistic training.
Monthly training fellowship of ₹10,000 per selected participant.
Professional art training at
government-recognized art and music institutions (Page No. 3)
Certification after successful completion of training.
Opportunity to receive structured guidance in classical, tribal, and folk art forms.
The fellowship is valid only for the approved training period of 3 months.
Step-01:
Download the prescribed format of the application form from the
official website
Step-02:
Fill in all the mandatory fields in the application form and attach copies of all the required documents (self-attested, if necessary).
Step-03:
Email or post the completed application in the prescribed format to:
Post: Director, Madhya Pradesh Tribal Museum, Shyamla Hills, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462002. India
E-mail: mptmfellowship@gmail.com
NOTE:
Applications must be submitted within the deadline mentioned in the advertisement.
Late applications will not be accepted.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step-01:** Download the prescribed format of the application form from the [official website](https://www.mptribalmuseum.com/). **Step-02:** Fill in all the mandatory fields in the application form and attach copies of all the required documents (self-attested, if necessary). **Step-03:** Email or post the completed application in the prescribed format to: Post: Director, Madhya Pradesh Tribal Museum, Shyamla Hills, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462002. India E-mail: mptmfellowship@gmail.com ***NOTE:*** - Applications must be submitted within the deadline mentioned in the advertisement. - Late applications will not be accepted.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a resident of Madhya Pradesh. 1. The applicant should be interested in training in one art discipline such as singing, instrumental music, dance, theatre, painting, or crafts. 1. The applicant should be between 18 and 35 years of age.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should be interested in training in one art discipline such as singing, instrumental music, dance, theatre, painting, or crafts.
The applicant should be between 18 and 35 years of age.
